licenseStatementSeen: blender-demo-files-page-excerpt.txt (retrieved 2026-07-09 from https://www.blender.org/download/demo-files/): the Human Base Meshes v1.4.1 card reads 'by Blender Studio and community contributions. ... 49 MB – CC0', updated Jan 20 2025
author: Blender Studio and community contributions
authorEvidence: same demo-files page card; bundle contains no author metadata beyond blender_assets.cats.txt
notes: NOT redistributed in this repository: the bundle's single .blend is 62 MB, over the ADR 0002 per-file limit, so the raw bundle is fetch-reproducible instead (characters/spike/fetch_base_meshes.sh pins URL + sha256). The committed app/Assets/ProjectOwned/Characters/Spike/SpikeSoldier.fbx is a project-owned derivative (GEO-body_male_realistic base mesh + scripted rig, garment, materials, and march animation added by characters/spike/spike_build.py); CC0 permits derivation without attribution, attribution given anyway in docs/assets/THIRD_PARTY_ASSETS.md scope note when the full kit lands. Phase 6 spike acquisition; the full character kit decision (MakeHuman/MPFB vs this bundle) happens after the spike verdict.
